chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-621 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on office objection For hearing of MA No.1318/2025 For hearing of main case. 11.11.2025 Mr. Shahzad Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Mir Muhammad Nohri, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1. ==================== For the reason to be recorded later, this petition is dismissed with directions to the learned trial Court to record the evidence and decided the lis within next three months. J U D G E Asif I. Khan
